name: IT Ops Slack Bot — Exa Knowledge Base + Claude Answers
description: Takes an IT question, searches a knowledge base using Exa for relevant documentation and solutions, uses Claude AI to synthesize an expert answer, and posts the response to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: IT ops AI SlackBot workflow - chat with your knowledge base

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for knowledge base search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

question.description: IT question to answer (e.g. 'How do I reset Active Directory passwords?')

knowledgeDomain.default: IT operations, system administration, troubleshooting, networking, security
knowledgeDomain.description: Domain to focus the knowledge base search

steps.name: Parse Exa search results into context
Build Claude prompt for IT answer
Run Claude AI to generate IT answer
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit answer message
